title: Poison Chiefs
aliases: Poison Chief 1 (marked in journal just once)
Poison Chief 2 (marked in journal just once)
Poison Chief 3 (marked in journal just once)
Poison Chief 4 (marked in journal just once)
summary: The Poison Chiefs are optional Yaoguai Chiefs you can fight in Chapter 6 of Black Myth: Wukong . There are four of them in total, though you only need to kill one Poison Chief to unlock the journal entry for it.

infobox.Rewards: Mind Core Cold Iron Leaves Fine Gold Thread

rewards_text: Mind Core Cold Iron Leaves Fine Gold Thread

sections.How to Find Poison Chief 1:
. From the area where you fought Jiao-Loong of Waves, ascend and look to the left. You should be able to see another body of water here, on a higher part of the cliff.
On the opposite side of the water, there's a clearing, with what appears to be a big rock sitting by the edge of it. This is actually one of the Poison Chiefs in the area, so fly over to it to tackle your next miniboss.
Poison Chief 1
sections.How to Find Poison Chief 2:
After defeating the Feng-Tail General drop down and activate the Rhino Watch Slope Keeper's Shrine.
Facing the Keeper's Shrine, fly up from it and look to the right. Get as high as you can, and you'll see a large rock. Head straight toward it and over it, then continue past and turn slightly to the right again.
In the midst of the trees, there's a small patch of ground with no grass. The Poison Chief can be found here.
Poison Chief 2
When you've beaten Lang-Baw-Baw , fly up again and look to the opposite side of the water. You'll see red trees in the distance, but it's the area on the right you'll want to go to first.
sections.How to Find Poison Chief 3:
As you get close to the edge of the cliff, you'll find another clearing with a rock in the middle. This is the third Poison Chief in the region.
Poison Chief 3
sections.How to Find Poison Chief 4:
Head back to the Keeper's Shrine once you've defeated the Cloudtreading Deer . Fly up high again, and look straight ahead for another rocky part of the cliff. It'll be hard to see from here, but fly straight forward and you should see a distinctive tall white tree. Next to it is a clearing, where you can find the final Poison Chief.
Poison Chief 4

raw_text: Boss: Poison Chiefs. Aliases: Poison Chief 1 (marked in journal just once); Poison Chief 2 (marked in journal just once); Poison Chief 3 (marked in journal just once); Poison Chief 4 (marked in journal just once). Type: Yaoguai Chief. Chapter: 6. Summary: The Poison Chiefs are optional Yaoguai Chiefs you can fight in Chapter 6 of Black Myth: Wukong . There are four of them in total, though you only need to kill one Poison Chief to unlock the journal entry for it. Location: Foothills Rewards: Mind Core Cold Iron Leaves Fine Gold Thread How to Find Poison Chief 1: . From the area where you fought Jiao-Loong of Waves, ascend and look to the left. You should be able to see another body of water here, on a higher part of the cliff. On the opposite side of the water, there's a clearing, with what appears to be a big rock sitting by the edge of it. This is actually one of the Poison Chiefs in the area, so fly over to it to tackle your next miniboss. Poison Chief 1 How to Find Poison Chief 2: After defeating the Feng-Tail General drop down and activate the Rhino Watch Slope Keeper's Shrine. Facing the Keeper's Shrine, fly up from it and look to the right. Get as high as you can, and you'll see a large rock. Head straight toward it and over it, then continue past and turn slightly to the right again. In the midst of the trees, there's a small patch of ground with no grass. The Poison Chief can be found here. Poison Chief 2 When you've beaten Lang-Baw-Baw , fly up again and look to the opposite side of the water. You'll see red trees in the distance, but it's the area on the right you'll want to go to first. How to Find Poison Chief 3: As you get close to the edge of the cliff, you'll find another clearing with a rock in the middle. This is the third Poison Chief in the region. Poison Chief 3 How to Find Poison Chief 4: Head back to the Keeper's Shrine once you've defeated the Cloudtreading Deer . Fly up high again, and look straight ahead for another rocky part of the cliff. It'll be hard to see from here, but fly straight forward and you should see a distinctive tall white tree. Next to it is a clearing, where you can find the final Poison Chief. Poison Chief 4
